class.help: Registra los datos de los examenes
class.label: Examen
class.name: EXAMEN

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_examen as oi_examen, t0.c_examen as c_examen, t0.d_examen as d_examen, t0.e_orden as e_orden, SEC.policy, t0.c_examen as CODE, t0.d_examen as TEXT, t0.oi_tipo_examen as oi_tipo_examen FROM SEL07_EXAMENES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.EXAMEN\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_examen LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_examen asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_examen as oi_examen, SEC.policy FROM SEL07_EXAMENES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.EXAMEN\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_examen LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_examen asc')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.description: Registra los datos de los Subexamenes de un Examen,
assosiation.label: Subexamenes
assosiation.name: SUBEXAMEN

assosiation.description: Registra las distintas competencias que habilitara el examen una vez aprobado.
assosiation.label: Competencias por Examen
assosiation.name: COMPET_EXA

assosiation.description: Registra los posibles resultados de un examen
assosiation.label: Resultados de Examenes
assosiation.name: RESUL_EXA

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.EXAMEN.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.EXAMEN.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL07_EXAMENES.oi_examen) as CNT from SEL07_EXAMENES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL07_EXAMENES.oi_examen={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL07_EXAMENES.d_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL07_EXAMENES.c_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL07_EXAMENES.oi_tipo_examen={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: se fija si el orden que se le esta cargando a un examen ya esta carado en otro
resource.name: QRY_ORDEN

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT COUNT(SEL07_EXAMENES.e_orden) AS CONT FROM SEL07_EXAMENES WHERE SEL07_EXAMENES.e_orden = {#PARAM:@e_orden} {%? (#PARAM:@oi_examen!='') {% AND SEL07_EXAMENES.oi_examen != {%=#PARAM:@oi_examen %} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra los datos de los Subexamenes de un Examen,
class.label: Subexamen
class.name: SUBEXAMEN

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

assosiation.description: Registra los resultados posibles de un subexamen en particular.
assosiation.label: Resultados de Subexamenes
assosiation.name: RESUL_SUBEXA

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.SUBEXAMEN.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.SUBEXAMEN.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL07_SUBEXAMEN.oi_subexamen) as CNT from SEL07_SUBEXAMEN Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL07_SUBEXAMEN.oi_subexamen={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL07_SUBEXAMEN.d_subexamen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL07_SUBEXAMEN.c_subexamen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL07_SUBEXAMEN.oi_examen={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra los resultados posibles de un subexamen en particular.
class.label: Resultado Subexamen
class.name: RESUL_SUBEXA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.RESUL_SUBEXA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.RESUL_SUBEXA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL07_RESUL_SUBEXA.oi_resul_subexa) as CNT from SEL07_RESUL_SUBEXA, SEL08_RESULTADOS join SEL07_RESUL_SUBEXA.OI_RESULTADO inner SEL08_RESULTADOS.OI_RESULTADO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL07_RESUL_SUBEXA.oi_resul_subexa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL08_RESULTADOS.d_resultado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL08_RESULTADOS.c_resultado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL07_RESUL_SUBEXA.oi_subexamen={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.FACT_SUBEXA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.FACT_SUBEXA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL07_FACT_SUBEXA.oi_fact_subexa) as CNT from SEL07_FACT_SUBEXA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL07_FACT_SUBEXA.oi_fact_subexa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL07_FACT_SUBEXA.oi_fact_subexa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL07_FACT_SUBEXA.oi_fact_subexa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL07_FACT_SUBEXA.oi_subexamen={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra las distintas competencias que habilitara el examen una vez aprobado.
class.label: Competencias Examen
class.name: COMPET_EXA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.COMPET_EXA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.COMPET_EXA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL07_COMPET_EXA.oi_compet_exa) as CNT from SEL07_COMPET_EXA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL07_COMPET_EXA.oi_compet_exa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL07_COMPET_EXA.oi_compet_exa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL07_COMPET_EXA.oi_compet_exa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL07_COMPET_EXA.oi_examen={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra los posibles resultados de un examen
class.label: Resultado Examen
class.name: RESUL_EXA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.RESUL_EXA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Examenes.RESUL_EXA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL07_RESUL_EXA.oi_resul_exa) as CNT from SEL07_RESUL_EXA, SEL08_RESULTADOS join SEL07_RESUL_EXA.OI_RESULTADO inner SEL08_RESULTADOS.OI_RESULTADO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL07_RESUL_EXA.oi_resul_exa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL08_RESULTADOS.d_resultado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL08_RESULTADOS.c_resultado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL07_RESUL_EXA.oi_examen={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
